120: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency, T3.firstName, T3.lastName FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T4.A2 = 'east Bohemia'

SELECT T2.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T4.A4 = 'East Bohemia'

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.birth_date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T2.district_id IN ( SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' )

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T3.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%')

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.birth_date LIKE '%1995%' OR T2.birth_date LIKE '%1996%' OR T2.birth_date LIKE '%1997%' OR T2.birth_date LIKE '%1998%' OR T2.birth_date LIKE '%1999%' AND T2.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A1 = 'East Bohemia')
